nodes.name: 中非共和國

nodes.name: Lesser jacana
nodes.summary: Lesser jacana（Lesser jacana，学名 Microparra capensis），分类上属于鸻形目，并归入雉鸻科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联29个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括湿地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The lesser jacana (Microparra capensis) is a wader in the family Jacanidae and can be found in Africa

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The lesser jacana can be found in wetland habitats in Angola, Botswana, Burkina Faso, Burundi, Cameroon, Central African Republic, Chad, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Eswatini, Ivory Coast, Ethiopia, Kenya, Malawi, Mali, Mauritania, Mozambique, Namibia, Niger, Nigeria, Rwanda, Sierra Leone, South Africa, Sudan, Tanzania, Uganda, Zambia, and Zimbabwe. They occupy the shorelines of permanent and seasonally flooded wetlands in Africa
